company_profile: Series A B2B SaaS startup, 8-person team, product-led growth, ~$2M ARR
must_haves: Production experience with embeddings and vector search (FAISS, Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.)
Hands-on retrieval or ranking system ownership (not just academic knowledge)
Python proficiency with real ML engineering output
Experience evaluating retrieval quality (NDCG, MRR, offline/online eval pipelines)
strong_positives: Previous founding engineer or very early-stage experience
Location in Pune or Noida (preferred) or major Tier-1 India city
explicit_traps: Candidates with many AI keyword skills but no actual AI/ML job history
Keyword stuffers: Marketing Manager / Civil Engineer / etc. with AI skills in skills section
Honeypots: impossible career timelines, expert skills with 0 months usage
Behavioral ghosts: inactive 6+ months AND response rate < 10%
Pure research backgrounds: academic labs or research-only roles without production systems
Title inflation: Lead/Staff/Principal titles but descriptions read junior
preferred_company_types: Fintech, edtech, hrtech, ecommerce platforms with AI/ML teams
penalty_company_types: Large IT services firms (TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, etc.)
